name: autonomous-qa-agent
description: Enterprise QA Automation Agent - Full Stack (Backend + Frontend)

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd pw-ai-agents && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix pw-ai-agents && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix pw-ai-agents && npm install --prefix frontend
